name: InsertNews
description: Inserts a new news in the system.
postconditions: The system shall notify the proper placement of the news.
The system shall notify the proper placement of the news.
The Operator Agency cancels the operation.

UC21: Activate the feature to insert a news.
Fill out the form and submit.
Verify the data entered and asks for confirmation of the transaction. Where the data is invalid or insufficient, the system activates the use case Errored.
Stores the data of the new news.
